reason: Successfully navigated to the agent interface, located the specified agent, verified its status, sent a math question message, and received the correct response containing "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with sidebar containing three agents.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260419-144351-q0sg" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully with the agent name displayed and status indicator visible.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status confirmed as "idle" (shown by blue dot and status text).
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully typed into the message input field and sent via the Send button. Chat session created with name "Math Question Assistance Session".
Waited for response - Agent processed the message and returned response in 1 second (well within the 3-minute timeout).

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Agent's response clearly displays "4" as the answer, visible in the chat interface with "Worked for 1s" completion indicator shown below the response.
